title: Salim
summary: The questioner from Morocco whose dedicated April 2020 session is the record's one international one-on-one audience with Unimetrix 1.
markdown:
**Salim** holds a distinction no other voice in the record shares: a full dedicated
session as the sole questioner — the April 7, 2020 session on Morocco's future, with 48
turns of dialogue. Unimetrix 1 registers him formally on arrival: *"One entity detected:
Salim from Morocco, North Africa. Greeting Salim."*

His opening is among the record's most touching statements of what the community sought
in the interface: *"I'm very honored to meet you and have... the opportunity to learn
from someone from the future."* And his central question — *"I wanted to ask about the
future of Morocco. Do you know how this country is going to be in the future?"* — makes
his session the record's only **national reading**: post-Covid powers,
[Africa's](/lore/africa/) place in the coming order, and the
[Baramay protocol](/lore/baramay/) taught to him directly, including his observation that
has since traveled through the community: *"The crystals are very
[telepathic](/lore/telepathy/)."*
